metaTitle: AI Table Features — Generate, Summarise, and Clean | Tablesmit
metaDescription: AI-powered table features in development — generate a table from plain text, summarise your data, and clean messy entries. Help shape what gets built first.
heroHeadline: The table that thinks with you — coming soon.
heroSubtext: We are building AI features directly into Tablesmit. Paste a paragraph and get a table. Ask for a summary. Clean inconsistent data automatically. The tools are in development — your input shapes what ships first.

aiFeatures.name: Generate table from text
aiFeatures.description: Paste a paragraph, a list, or raw notes. The AI reads the structure and generates a properly formatted table — columns labelled, rows populated, types inferred.
aiFeatures.example: You paste: 'The team has three members. Alice is a designer based in Lagos earning ₦450,000. Bob is a developer in Abuja earning ₦520,000. Carol is a PM in Port Harcourt earning ₦480,000.' The AI produces a four-column table with Name, Role, Location, and Salary columns.

aiFeatures.name: Summarise this table
aiFeatures.description: The AI reads your table and produces a two or three sentence plain-English summary of what the data shows — key patterns, totals, standout values. Useful for adding a findings paragraph above a results table.
aiFeatures.example: A 12-row sales table produces: 'Q3 shows the strongest performance, with total revenue of $284,000 across all regions. The North region consistently outperformed targets, while the South region declined by 14% compared to Q2.'

aiFeatures.name: Clean messy data
aiFeatures.description: Inconsistent date formats, mixed currency symbols, trailing whitespace, mixed capitalisation — the AI normalises your data into consistent, clean values across the whole table.
aiFeatures.example: 'jan 5 2024', '05-01-24', 'January 5th, 2024' in a date column all become '05 Jan 2024'. '$1,200', '1200 USD', '$ 1200.00' in a currency column all become '$1,200.00'.

aiFeatures.name: Convert paragraph to table
aiFeatures.description: Paste a section of structured prose — a product comparison, a list of specifications, a numbered set of findings — and the AI restructures it into a table. Ideal for turning research notes into publication-ready data.

benefits.heading: Time you will never get back — given back
benefits.body: Manually structuring data from notes into a table can take twenty minutes. Generate from text does it in seconds. Clean messy data does in one click what would take careful cell-by-cell review.

benefits.heading: Processed in the browser — your data stays private
benefits.body: When AI features ship, the AI call goes through a serverless function. Your table data is not stored, not logged, and not used for training. The response comes back and the connection closes.

benefits.heading: Help us build what matters most to you
benefits.body: These features are in development. The order they ship depends on what the community needs most. Tell us which one you would use first.

steps.heading: Find the AI panel
steps.body: The AI Features panel is in the right sidebar. Click AI in the toolbar to open it directly.

steps.heading: See what is coming
steps.body: Each feature is listed with a description. 'Coming soon' means it is in development — not abandoned, not vaporware.

steps.heading: Tell us what to build first
steps.body: Use the contact page or open a GitHub Discussion to vote for the feature you need most. The most-requested feature ships first.

useCases: A researcher who wants to paste interview notes and generate a structured comparison table automatically
An analyst who imports CSV data from a legacy system with inconsistent date and currency formats
A writer who wants a one-paragraph summary of a 30-row data table to include above it in their article
Anyone who spends time manually reformatting data that a model could clean in seconds

cta.heading: Which feature do you need first?
cta.body: Tell us and we will build it. AI features are shaped by real use — not product roadmap guesswork.

_codex_notes.note: This page has status: 'coming-soon' at the top level. Render a prominent amber 'In development' banner below the hero. The aiFeatures array renders as a 2×2 card grid (or stacked on mobile). Each card: icon, name, status badge, description, and example (in a styled blockquote or code-like box). The cta object renders as a callout section at the bottom of the page before related features. Do not render the standard steps section for this page — replace with the cta section.
